privileged_info_summary: Task export_pdf@1 is a synthetic task requiring an agent to export a 3-slide OpenDocument Presentation (ODP) to PDF format using LibreOffice Impress. The presentation is synthetically created with empty slides named Slide1, Slide2, and Slide3. Verification checks two criteria: (1) PDF file must exist and exceed 1KB, (2) PDF must have valid PDF header (%PDF). Both criteria must pass for success (75% threshold). Output is expected at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/export_test.pdf. Task timeout is 90 seconds with maximum 15 steps. Difficulty is rated easy. Note: Task description mentions 'specific quality settings' but no quality settings are enforced in setup or verification.
